since_last: 56% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.12%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.21% · Gold +0.23% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 56% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.12%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.12%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.59%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.59%, QCOM +10.68%, LRCX +7.21%, AMAT +7.10%, INTC +6.55%. Laggards: BABA -2.79%, APP -2.23%, ADBE -1.57%, ADBE -1.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.13% at $159.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
